channel.title: 📊 Financial Intelligence Daily
channel.description: Daily financial intelligence snapshot — markets, crypto, macro, construction, housing, jobs, and portfolio

item.title: 📊 Open Financial Intelligence Dashboard
item.description:
📊 Financial Intelligence Dashboard
Interactive charts and analysis — markets, crypto, housing, jobs, construction costs, credit stress, and macro regime scoring. Updated daily by the Nightly Consolidator.
Open Dashboard →

item.title: 📊 Financial Intelligence — Saturday, April 11, 2026
item.description:
📈 MARKETS & RISK Daily · as of Apr 11, 2026
✅ Regime: Neutral — Fear & Greed at 50 (Neutral). Markets closed for weekend; equity, rates, and commodity fields not refreshed.

Most recent weekday close (Apr 8): S&P futures −0.97% | DXY 98.76 | 10Y 4.31% | VIX 23 | HY spreads widening | WTI $96.48 | Gold $4,667

💡 Sentiment shift: Fear & Greed climbed from 23 (Extreme Fear, Apr 8) to 50 (Neutral, Apr 11) over the week — meaningful risk sentiment improvement despite weekend data gaps.

👉 Watch Monday open for confirmation of the neutral regime — regime label shifted from Risk-On (Apr 8) to Neutral (Apr 11).
₿ CRYPTO & DIGITAL ASSETS Daily · as of Apr 11, 2026 | Weekly deep-dive: Apr 6
BTC: $73,072 (+1.4% 24h) | Dominance: 57.2% | Fear & Greed: 50 (Neutral)
EOD reference (Apr 7): $68,965 | Structure: Neutral

✅ BTC broke above $73K — up from $71.5K mid-week and $68.9K EOD Apr 7. Clean break of the $69K–$70K resistance zone that was pressuring price earlier in the week.

💡 Weekly deep-dive (Apr 6): BTC/IGV correlation at 0.73 — still trading as software proxy. On-chain phase: Accumulation (LTH control ~80% of supply, exchange reserves at 6-year lows ~2.1M BTC). Stablecoin market cap hit record $317B with $1.36B weekly inflows.

✅ Structural: Mastercard acquiring BVNK for up to $1.8B — legacy networks treating stablecoin rails as core infrastructure.
🏠 HOUSING & REAL ESTATE Local: when new data | National: Monthly (1st) · as of Apr 1, 2026
Local (Hollister/San Benito): Median $748,584 | Active listings: 154 | Months supply: 1.52 | Price cuts: 47%
No new local data this cycle — Hollister remains balanced, median down 5% YoY.

National (Apr 1 release):
Existing sales: 4.09M | New home sales: 587K | Starts: 1,487K | Permits: 1,376K
NAR median: $398,000 | Case-Shiller YoY: +1.2%
30Y mortgage: 6.38% | MBA Refi Index: 1,341 | NAHB HMI: 38

⚠️ NAHB HMI at 38 — builder sentiment deeply pessimistic. Combined with 47% local price cuts, signals buyer hesitancy despite mortgage rates easing from 7%+ peaks.
💼 JOBS & LABOR Monthly (1st) · as of Apr 1, 2026
🔥 NFP: −92K — first negative headline print. Prior month revised down −17K.

U-3: 4.4% | LFPR: 62.0% | Avg hourly earnings YoY: +1.4%
JOLTS openings: 6.9M | Quit rate: 1.9% | ADP private: +62K
Initial claims (4-wk avg): 210K | Continuing claims: 1,819K
Construction payrolls: +30K | CA unemployment: 5.1%

⚠️ Critical signal: Negative NFP combined with rising U-3 and falling LFPR — labor market weakening across multiple indicators. Construction payrolls (+30K) remain a bright spot but may lag the broader trend.
🏗️ CONSTRUCTION & REMODELING Weekly (Fridays) · as of Apr 3, 2026 ⚠️ stale
Lumber$596/MBF
Copper$6.06/lb
Steel HRC$975/ton
RMI: 64 | ABI: 49.4 | Backlog: 8.1 months | Permits: 1,376K
National construction spending: $2,190B

Cost environment: Inflating

⚠️ ABI below 50 (49.4) signals contraction in architecture billings — a leading indicator for construction activity 9–12 months ahead. Copper elevated at $6.06/lb. Data is 8 days old — Task 6 has not produced a fresh Apr 10 reading.
📊 MACRO REGIME & SCORECARD Weekly (Mondays) · as of Apr 6, 2026
Yield Curve 2s10s+0.52%✅ Supportive
Credit SpreadsWidening (~316 bps)⚠️ Headwind
ISM PMI52.7✅ Supportive
Fed Path0 cuts priced⚠️ Headwind
DXY TrendUp (safe-haven bid)⚠️ Headwind
Regime: Neutral (tilting Risk-Off)

Sector rotation: Leading — XLE, XLU, XLI | Lagging — XLK, XLC, XLY (stagflation-lite)
Construction payrolls: +26K (March, rebounding from weather declines)

💡 Watch: Fed path fully unwound 2026 cuts on Iran/oil shock. If conflict premium fades, rate-cut expectations could re-emerge — bullish for BTC and duration.
💰 PORTFOLIO & EARNINGS Monthly (1st) · as of Apr 1, 2026
S&P EPS beat rate: 75% | Blended EPS growth: +13.0%

🔥 Portfolio alerts: IBRX crashed 26% on FDA Anktiva warning. XRPC down 41% on XRP collapse. APP and AVGO both pulled back 15%+ from highs.

⚠️ Key risks: TSMC capacity constraints threatening AI chip supply. IBRX regulatory/litigation risk unresolved. Crypto altcoin exposure (XRPC) deteriorating.

👉 Watch: Earnings season kicking off — 75% beat rate solid but concentrated in defensives. Growth/tech under pressure from rate repricing.
📊 Financial Intelligence Daily Snapshot
Dashboard: Open Interactive Dashboard
Generated Saturday, April 11, 2026 by Claude Cowork · Nightly Consolidator

item.title: 📊 Financial Intelligence — Wednesday, April 8, 2026
item.description:
📈 MARKETS & RISK Daily · as of Apr 8, 2026
⚠️ Risk-On regime but Fear & Greed at 23 (Extreme Fear) — mixed signals. S&P futures down 0.97% suggest caution despite regime label.

S&P Futures: −0.97% | DXY: 98.76 (↓ trending down) | 10Y: 4.31% | VIX: 23 | HY Spreads: Widening
WTI Oil: $96.48 | Gold: $4,667

🔥 Alert tickers: BTC, NEM, FETH, XRPC
Sectors: XLE leading, XLK lagging — energy continues to dominate while tech struggles in risk-off rotation.

💡 BTC EOD: $68,965 — Testing $69K–$70K resistance zone. Dominance at 56.8%.

💡 Macro voices: Visser remains bullish on physical AI and PMI-driven industrial cycle for 2026. No material new posts from Pomp in past 24 hours.
₿ CRYPTO & DIGITAL ASSETS Daily | Weekly deep-dive updates Mondays · as of Apr 8, 2026
BTC: $71,547 (+4.1% 24h) | EOD: $68,965 | Dominance: 56.8%
Fear & Greed: 23 (Extreme Fear)

🔥 Testing $69K–$70K resistance zone — key technical level. Daily price ($71.5K) diverging from EOD ($69K) suggests intraday volatility.

💡 Weekly deep-dive (Apr 6): BTC/IGV correlation at 0.73 — still trading as software proxy. On-chain phase: Accumulation. LTH control 80% of supply, exchange reserves at 6-year lows (~2.1M BTC). Stablecoin market cap hit $317B record high with $1.36B weekly inflows.

✅ Structural signal: Mastercard acquiring BVNK for up to $1.8B to bridge stablecoin rails with traditional payments — legacy networks now treating stablecoins as core infrastructure.
🏠 HOUSING & REAL ESTATE Local: when new data | National: Monthly (1st) · as of Apr 1, 2026
Local (Hollister/San Benito): Median $748,584 | Active listings: 154 | Months supply: 1.52 | Price cuts: 47%
No new local data since last report — Hollister median $750K, down 5% YoY, balanced market.

National (Apr 1 release):
Existing sales: 4.09M | New home sales: 587K | Starts: 1,487K | Permits: 1,376K
NAR median price: $398,000 | Case-Shiller YoY: +1.2%
30Y mortgage rate: 6.38% | MBA Refi Index: 1,341 | NAHB HMI: 38

⚠️ NAHB HMI at 38 — builder sentiment deeply pessimistic. Combined with 47% price cuts locally, signals significant buyer hesitancy despite rates easing from 7%+ peaks.
💼 JOBS & LABOR Monthly (1st) | Claims: weekly when flagged · as of Apr 1, 2026
🔥 NFP: −92K — first negative headline payrolls print. Prior month revised down −17K. Labor market deteriorating rapidly.

U-3: 4.4% | LFPR: 62.0% | Avg hourly earnings YoY: +1.4%
JOLTS openings: 6.9M | Quit rate: 1.9% | ADP private: +62K
Initial claims (4-wk avg): 210K | Continuing claims: 1,819K

Construction payrolls: +30K | CA unemployment: 5.1%

⚠️ Critical signal: Negative NFP combined with rising U-3 (4.4%) and falling LFPR (62.0%) — the labor market is weakening across multiple indicators. Construction payrolls (+30K) remain a bright spot but may lag the broader trend.
🏗️ CONSTRUCTION & REMODELING Weekly (Fridays) · as of Apr 3, 2026
Lumber$596/MBF
Copper$6.06/lb
Steel HRC$975/ton
RMI: 64 | ABI: 49.4 | Backlog: 8.1 months | Permits: 1,376K
National construction spending: $2,190B

Cost environment: Inflating

⚠️ ABI below 50 (49.4) signals contraction in architecture billings — a leading indicator for construction activity 9-12 months ahead. Copper at $6.06/lb remains elevated. Cost environment inflating despite some lumber relief from peak.
📊 MACRO REGIME & SCORECARD Weekly (Mondays) · as of Apr 6, 2026
Yield Curve 2s10s+0.52%✅ Supportive
Credit SpreadsWidening (~316 bps)⚠️ Headwind
ISM PMI52.7✅ Supportive
Fed Path0 cuts priced⚠️ Headwind
DXY TrendUp (safe-haven bid)⚠️ Headwind
Regime: Neutral (tilting Risk-Off)

Sector rotation: Leading — XLE, XLU, XLI | Lagging — XLK, XLC, XLY (stagflation-lite positioning)
Construction payrolls: +26K (March, rebounding from weather declines)

🔥 Key change: Fed path shifted from Supportive → Headwind (3 cuts → 0 cuts priced). Iran/oil shock driving inflation re-acceleration and hawkish repricing.
💰 PORTFOLIO & EARNINGS Monthly (1st) · as of Apr 1, 2026
S&P EPS beat rate: 75% | Blended EPS growth: +13.0%

🔥 Portfolio alerts: IBRX crashed 26% on FDA Anktiva warning. XRPC down 41% on XRP price collapse. APP and AVGO both pulled back 15%+ from highs.

⚠️ Key risks: TSMC capacity constraints threatening AI chip supply. IBRX regulatory/litigation risk unresolved. Crypto altcoin exposure (XRPC) deteriorating.

👉 Watch: Earnings season kicking off — 75% beat rate is solid but concentrated in defensives. Growth/tech names under pressure from rate repricing.
📊 Financial Intelligence Daily Snapshot
Dashboard: Open Interactive Dashboard
Generated April 8, 2026 by Claude Cowork · Nightly Consolidator

item.title: 📊 Financial Intelligence — Tuesday, April 7, 2026
item.description:
📈 MARKETS & RISK Daily · as of Apr 6, 2026
⚠️ Risk-Off regime persists — Fear & Greed at 19 (Extreme Fear). Iran/oil premium continues to dominate risk pricing.

S&P Futures: +0.1% | DXY: 99.81 (trending down) | 10Y: 4.31% | VIX: 24.48 | Put/Call: 1.28
WTI Oil: $110.70 | Gold: $4,686 | HY Spreads: Widening

🔥 Alert tickers: TSLA, ROIV, IBRX
Sectors: XLE leading, XLK lagging — energy dominance on Iran/oil premium, classic risk-off rotation.

💡 Macro voices: Visser frames 2026 as physical AI investment year — expects crypto to dominate growth as AI shifts to manufacturing. Pomp highlights BTC up 7.75% since Iran conflict while traditional markets down 2-3%.
₿ CRYPTO & DIGITAL ASSETS Daily | Weekly deep-dive updates Mondays · as of Apr 6, 2026
₿ BTC EOD $69,356 — structure neutral. Testing $70,000 psychological resistance.

24h: -0.01% | Dominance: 56.48% | Fear & Greed: 19 (Extreme Fear)

🔥 Weekly deep-dive (Apr 6):
BTC/IGV Correlation: 0.73 — "Software Proxy" mode continues (threshold 0.50). Holiday-thinned trading caused mild divergence.
On-Chain Phase: Accumulation — exchange reserves at 6-year lows (~2.1M BTC), LTH controlling ~80% of supply, MVRV in fair-value zone.
Stablecoin MCap: $317B record — $1.36B weekly inflows. Mastercard acquiring BVNK ($1.8B) for stablecoin-fiat bridge.
BTC Dominance: 56.1%, gradual decline from 65% peak — mild altcoin rotation signal.

💡 Stablecoin infrastructure growing independently of speculative cycles. Q1 2026 stablecoin volume: $28T (51% QoQ increase).
🏠 HOUSING & REAL ESTATE Local: when new data | National: Monthly (1st) · as of Apr 1, 2026
🏠 National (Apr 1): Existing home sales 4.09M SAAR | New home sales 587K | Starts 1,487K | Permits 1,376K
NAR median $398,000 | Case-Shiller YoY +1.2% | 30Y mortgage rate 6.38% ↓
NAHB HMI at 38 — ⚠️ builder sentiment very weak. MBA refi index 1,341.

🏡 Local Hollister/San Benito: Median $748,584 | 154 active listings | 83 DOM | 1.52 months supply
47% price cuts. Market balanced but trending softer — median down 5-8.7% YoY.

💡 NAHB HMI at 38 is well below neutral (50) — builder confidence at weakest point since late 2023. Combined with ABI below 50, watch for pipeline contraction in 6-12 months.
💼 JOBS & LABOR Monthly (1st) | Claims: weekly when flagged · as of Apr 1, 2026
⚠️ NFP: -92K — first negative print signals labor market deterioration. Prior month revised down -17K.

U-3: 4.4% ↑ | LFPR: 62.0% ↓ | Avg hourly earnings YoY: +1.4%
JOLTS openings: 6.9M | Quit rate: 1.9% | ADP private payrolls: +62K
Initial claims 4wk avg: 210K | Continuing claims: 1,819K

🏗️ Construction: +26K jobs in March (macro scorecard) / +30K (monthly BLS) | CA unemployment: 5.1%

🔥 Construction holding up amid broader labor weakness — but ABI at 49.4 warns of pipeline contraction. NFP negative print is a significant warning signal; watch for revisions.
🏗️ CONSTRUCTION & REMODELING Weekly (Fridays) · as of Apr 3, 2026
Lumber$596/MBF
Copper$6.06/lb
Steel HRC$975/ton
⚠️ Cost environment: Inflating — all three key materials trending up.
RMI: 64 | ABI: 49.4 (contracting) | Backlog: 8.1 months | National permits: 1,376K
Construction spending: $2,190B

💡 ABI below 50 signals future design pipeline contraction — downstream remodeling demand impact in 6-12 months. Copper at $6.06 remains elevated, adding pressure to electrical/plumbing costs.
📊 MACRO REGIME & SCORECARD Weekly (Mondays) · as of Apr 6, 2026
Regime: Neutral-to-Risk-Off — real economy solid (ISM 52.7, curve +52bps) but geopolitical overhang dominates.

Yield Curve 2s10s+0.52 ✅
Credit SpreadsWidening (~316 bps) ⚠️
ISM PMI52.7 ✅
Fed Cuts Priced0 ⚠️
DXY TrendUp ⚠️
Regime ScoreNeutral
🔥 Key changes: Fed Path flipped Supportive → Headwind (0 cuts priced now). Credit spreads widening. ISM improved to 52.7.
Sector rotation: XLE, XLU, XLI leading / XLK, XLC, XLY lagging — stagflation-lite positioning.
Construction payrolls: +26K in March.
💰 PORTFOLIO & EARNINGS Monthly (1st) · as of Apr 1, 2026
S&P EPS beat rate: 75% | Blended EPS growth: +13.0%

⚠️ Portfolio notes: IBRX crashed 26% on FDA Anktiva warning; XRPC down 41% on XRP price collapse; APP and AVGO both pulled back 15%+ from highs.

🔥 Key risks: TSMC capacity constraints threatening AI chip supply; IBRX regulatory/litigation risk unresolved; crypto altcoin exposure (XRPC) deteriorating.
📊 Financial Intelligence Daily Snapshot
Dashboard: Open Interactive Dashboard
Generated April 7, 2026 by Claude Cowork · Nightly Consolidator

item.title: 📊 Financial Intelligence — Monday, April 6, 2026
item.description:
📈 MARKETS & RISK Daily · as of Apr 6, 2026
⚠️ Risk-Off regime continues — Fear & Greed at 19 (Extreme Fear), up slightly from 12 over the weekend but sentiment remains deeply bearish.

S&P Futures: +0.1% | DXY: 99.81 (down trend) | 10Y: 4.31% | VIX: 24.48 ↓ | Put/Call: 1.28
WTI Oil: $110.70 | Gold: $4,686 | HY Spreads: Widening

🔥 Alert tickers: TSLA, ROIV, IBRX
Sectors: XLE leading, XLK lagging — energy dominance persists on Iran/oil premium.

💡 Macro voices: Visser frames 2026 as physical AI investment year — expects crypto to dominate growth as AI shifts into manufacturing. Pomp: BTC up 7.75% since Iran conflict began while Nasdaq -2.2%, S&P -3.45%, gold -3.5% — calls BTC a "chaos hedge."
₿ CRYPTO & DIGITAL ASSETS Daily | Weekly deep-dive updates Mondays · as of Apr 6, 2026
₿ BTC $67,288 EOD (Apr 5) — structure neutral. Testing $66,700–$67,500 support cluster — holding but not confirmed.

24h: -0.01% | Dominance: 57.0% | Fear & Greed: 19 (Extreme Fear)

🔥 Weekly deep-dive (fresh):
BTC/IGV Correlation: 0.73 — remains in "Software Proxy" mode (>0.50). Mild divergence this week (BTC dipped, IGV ticked up) reflects holiday-thinned trading, not structural break.
On-Chain Phase: Accumulation — exchange reserves at 6-year lows (~2.1M BTC), LTH controlling ~80% of supply with 10,700 BTC added recently. MVRV in fair-value zone.
Stablecoin MCap: $317B (record high) — $1.36B weekly inflows. Mastercard acquiring BVNK for up to $1.8B to bridge stablecoin/fiat rails.
BTC Dominance: 56.1% — gradual decline from 65% peak signals mild altcoin rotation.

💡 Stablecoin infrastructure demand growing independently of speculative price cycles — structural tailwind.
🏠 HOUSING & REAL ESTATE Local: when new data | National: Monthly (1st) · as of Apr 1, 2026
🏠 National (as of Apr 1): Existing home sales 4.09M SAAR | New home sales 587K | Starts 1,487K | Permits 1,376K
NAR median price $398,000 | Case-Shiller YoY +1.2% | 30Y mortgage rate 6.38% ↓
NAHB HMI at 38 — ⚠️ builder sentiment very weak. MBA refi index 1,341.

🏡 Local Hollister/San Benito: Median $750,000 (down ~5% YoY) | 83 DOM | 1.52 months supply
💡 No new local data today. Balanced market with 154 active listings.
💼 JOBS & LABOR Monthly (1st) | Claims: weekly when flagged · as of Apr 1, 2026
⚠️ NFP: -92K — first negative print signals labor market deterioration. Prior month revised down -17K.

U-3: 4.4% ↑ | LFPR: 62.0% ↓ | Avg hourly earnings YoY: +1.4%
JOLTS openings: 6.9M | Quit rate: 1.9% | ADP private payrolls: +62K
Initial claims 4wk avg: 210K | Continuing claims: 1,819K

🏗️ Construction: +26K jobs in March (macro scorecard) / +30K (monthly data) | CA unemployment: 5.1%
🔥 Construction holding up as an island of strength amid broader labor weakness — but ABI at 49.4 warns of pipeline contraction ahead.
🏗️ CONSTRUCTION & REMODELING Weekly (Fridays) · as of Apr 3, 2026
Lumber$596/MBF
Copper$6.06/lb
Steel HRC$975/ton
⚠️ Cost environment: Inflating — all three materials trending up. Copper at $6.06 remains elevated.
RMI: 64 | ABI: 49.4 (contracting) | Backlog: 8.1 months | National permits: 1,376K
National construction spending: $2,190B

💡 ABI below 50 signals future design pipeline contraction — watch for downstream effects on remodeling demand in 6–12 months.
📊 MACRO REGIME & SCORECARD Weekly (Mondays) · as of Apr 6, 2026
Regime: Neutral-to-Risk-Off — real economy solid (ISM 52.7, curve +52bps) but geopolitical overhang dominates risk pricing.

Yield Curve 2s10s+0.52 ✅
Credit SpreadsWidening (~316 bps) ⚠️
ISM PMI52.7 ✅
Fed Cuts Priced0 ⚠️
DXY TrendUp ⚠️
Regime ScoreNeutral
🔥 Change flags vs. prior week: Fed Path flipped Supportive → Headwind (3 cuts → 0 cuts). Credit spreads now widening (~316bps). ISM improved 52.3 → 52.7.
Sector rotation: Leading XLE, XLU, XLI / Lagging XLK, XLC, XLY — stagflation-lite positioning confirmed.
Construction payrolls: +26K in March, rebounding from weather declines.
💰 PORTFOLIO & EARNINGS Monthly (1st) · as of Apr 1, 2026
Apr 2026 earnings: S&P EPS beat rate 75% | Blended EPS growth +13.0%

⚠️ Portfolio pain: IBRX crashed 26% on FDA Anktiva warning. XRPC down 41% on XRP price collapse. APP and AVGO both pulled back 15%+ from highs.

🔥 Key risk: TSMC capacity constraints threatening AI chip supply; IBRX regulatory/litigation risk unresolved; crypto altcoin exposure (XRPC) deteriorating.
📊 Financial Intelligence Daily Snapshot
Dashboard: Open Interactive Dashboard
Generated April 6, 2026 by Claude Cowork · Nightly Consolidator

item.title: 📊 Financial Intelligence — Sunday, April 5, 2026
item.description:
📈 MARKETS & RISK Daily · as of Apr 5, 2026
⚠️ Risk-Off regime persists — Fear & Greed at 12 (Extreme Fear). Weekend markets thin; S&P futures, DXY, VIX, and yields not updating until Monday.

BTC holding $67,100 with 0.2% 24h change. Dominance at 56.3%. Oil spike past $110 continues to pressure risk assets across the board.

💡 Macro voice monitor: No new material from Visser or Pomp in past 24h. Standing thesis: Fed trapped by debt/oil/slowing growth — Bitcoin built for this regime. Pomp: ProCap bought 450 BTC in March, thesis is deflation + de-dollarization. Jeff Park CIO departure from ProCap effective April 3.
₿ CRYPTO & DIGITAL ASSETS Daily | Weekly deep-dive updates Mondays · as of Apr 5, 2026
₿ BTC $67,244 EOD (Apr 4) — structure bearish. $67,000 support holding but weakening, each bounce producing lower highs.

24h: +0.2% | Dominance: 56.3% | Fear & Greed: 12 (Extreme Fear)

🔥 Key level: $67K support critical — failure opens path to $64K range. Resistance at $68K–$68.8K cluster.

Weekly deep-dive (as of Mar 23): BTC/IGV correlation 0.72 | On-chain phase: Accumulation | Stablecoin mkt cap: $317B
🏠 HOUSING & REAL ESTATE Local: when new data | National: Monthly (1st) · as of Apr 3, 2026
🏠 National (as of Apr 1): Existing home sales 4.09M SAAR | New home sales 587K | Starts 1,487K | Permits 1,376K
NAR median price $398,000 | Case-Shiller YoY +1.2% | 30Y mortgage rate 6.38% ↓
NAHB HMI at 38 — ⚠️ builder sentiment very weak. MBA refi index 1,341.

🏡 Local Hollister/San Benito (as of Apr 3): Median $750,000 (down 5–8.7% YoY) | 83 DOM | 1.52 months supply
💡 Balanced market. 2–4% appreciation forecast for 2026. 154 active listings per monthly data.
💼 JOBS & LABOR Monthly (1st) | Claims: weekly when flagged · as of Apr 1, 2026
⚠️ NFP: -92K — first negative print signals labor market deterioration. Prior month revised down -17K.

U-3: 4.4% ↑ | LFPR: 62.0% ↓ | Avg hourly earnings YoY: +1.4%
JOLTS openings: 6.9M | Quit rate: 1.9% | ADP private payrolls: +62K
Initial claims 4wk avg: 210K | Continuing claims: 1,819K

🏗️ Construction payrolls: +30K MoM | CA unemployment: 5.1%
🔥 Negative NFP is a significant signal — watch for Fed response and whether construction sector diverges from broader weakness.
🏗️ CONSTRUCTION & REMODELING Weekly (Fridays) · as of Apr 3, 2026
Lumber$596/MBF
Copper$6.06/lb
Steel HRC$975/ton
⚠️ Cost environment: Inflating — all three materials trending up. Copper at $6.06 is elevated.
RMI: 64 | ABI: 49.4 (contracting) | Backlog: 8.1 months | National permits: 1,376K
National construction spending: $2,190B

💡 ABI below 50 signals future design pipeline contraction — watch for downstream effects on remodeling demand in 6–12 months.
📊 MACRO REGIME & SCORECARD Weekly (Mondays) · as of Mar 23, 2026
Regime: Neutral → Risk-Off shift (as of Mar 23 scorecard, daily regime = Risk-Off)

Yield Curve 2s10s+0.59
Credit SpreadsTight
ISM PMI52.3
Fed Cuts Priced3
DXY TrendUp
Sector rotation: Leading XLE, XLF / Lagging XLU, XLRE, XLP
💡 Daily regime shifted Risk-Off since late March with VIX elevated and fear extreme. Weekly scorecard still shows Neutral — expect Monday update to catch up.
💰 PORTFOLIO & EARNINGS Monthly (1st) · as of Apr 1, 2026
Apr 2026 earnings: S&P EPS beat rate 75% | Blended EPS growth +13.0%

⚠️ Portfolio pain: IBRX crashed 26% on FDA Anktiva warning. XRPC down 41% on XRP price collapse. APP and AVGO both pulled back 15%+ from highs.

🔥 Key risk: TSMC capacity constraints threatening AI chip supply; IBRX regulatory/litigation risk unresolved; crypto altcoin exposure (XRPC) deteriorating.
📊 Financial Intelligence Daily Snapshot
Dashboard: Open Interactive Dashboard
Generated April 5, 2026 by Claude Cowork · Nightly Consolidator

item.title: 📊 Financial Intelligence — Saturday, April 04, 2026
item.description:
📈 MARKETS & RISK Daily · as of Apr 4, 2026
⚠️ Regime: Risk-Off — Fear & Greed at 12 (Extreme Fear)
BTC EOD: $67,244 | Structure: Bearish | Dominance: 56.2%
💡 $67,000 support holding but weakening — each bounce producing lower highs

Last trading day (Apr 3): S&P Futures -0.002 | DXY 99.65 | 10Y 4.31% | VIX 25.00
WTI Oil $111.54 | Gold $4650 | Sectors: XLE leading, XLK lagging
🔥 BTC — holding $66K–$67K consolidation range over Good Friday weekend; oil spike past $110 pressuring risk assets; Jeff Park exits ProCap (BRR) as CIO
₿ CRYPTO & DIGITAL ASSETS Daily | Weekly deep-dive Mondays · as of Apr 4, 2026
BTC: $67,244 (0.48% 24h) | Dominance: 56.2%
⚠️ Fear & Greed: 12 — Extreme Fear
💡 $67,000 support holding but weakening — each bounce producing lower highs

Weekly deep-dive (as of 2026-03-23):
BTC/IGV Correlation: 0.72 | On-Chain Phase: Accumulation | Stablecoin MCap: $317B
🏠 HOUSING & REAL ESTATE Local: when new data | National: Monthly (1st) · as of Apr 1, 2026
Local (Hollister/San Benito): Median $748584 | Months Supply: 1.52
California: Median $850680

National (as of Apr 1):
Existing Sales: 4.09M | New Sales: 587K | NAR Median: $398000
30Y Rate: 6.38% | NAHB HMI: 38 | Case-Shiller YoY: 1.2%
